title: Raymond James Financial: 5 Reasons To Buy This Undercovered But Fundamentally Strong Bank
text: Raymond James Financial receives a buy rating due to capital strength, revenue diversification, positive inflows, stable dividends, and a current price well below its 200-day SMA. The company's valuation seems slightly overvalued, when using P/E and P/B ratios. Risks to the bullish outlook include the firm's credit risk exposure, particularly non-performing loans and net charge-offs.
